/usr/bin/ar qc libecs.a CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/EntityRef.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/addon/Addons.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/command/Commands.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/core/component/ComponentRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/core/entity/EntityManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/core/entity/EntityRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/core/entity/EntityType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/core/memory/Allocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/core/query/Iter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/core/query/Query.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/core/query/QueryRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/core/storage/Table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/core/storage/TableRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/core/system/SystemRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecs.dir/ecs/world/World.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libecs.a
